---
title: "Alin Mechenici — Events & Speaking"
title-block-style: none
description: "Kommende Vorträge, Workshops, Hackathons und Trainings mit Alin Mechenici, Gründer & CEO von chen.ist. Via iCal abonnieren oder Alin zu Ihrer Veranstaltung einladen."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="canonical" href="https://chen.ist/de/alinmechenici/events/">
        <meta property="og:image" content="https://chen.ist/assets/images/alinmechenici/alinmechenici.jpg">
        <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
        <meta name="twitter:image" content="https://chen.ist/assets/images/alinmechenici/alinmechenici.jpg">
        <link rel="alternate" type="text/calendar" href="https://chen.ist/alinmechenici.ics" title="Alin Mechenici — Öffentlicher Kalender">
        <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://chen.ist/alinmechenici/events/">
        <link rel="alternate" hreflang="ro" href="https://chen.ist/ro/alinmechenici/events/">
        <link rel="alternate" hreflang="sv" href="https://chen.ist/sv/alinmechenici/events/">
        <link rel="alternate" hreflang="de" href="https://chen.ist/de/alinmechenici/events/">
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .am-ev-hero { min-height: 60vh; }
  .am-sub { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.6rem; margin-top:1.5rem; justify-content:center; }
  .am-sub a { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem; padding: 0.7rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color:#fff; text-decoration:none; font-weight:500; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.22); backdrop-filter: blur(6px); transition: background .2s ease, transform .2s ease; }
  .am-sub a:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); transform: translateY(-1px); }
  .am-sub a.primary { background: var(--c, #81BD4A); border-color: var(--c, #81BD4A); }
  .am-event { display:grid; grid-template-columns: 110px 1fr auto; gap: 1.5rem; align-items:start; padding: 1.5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(127,127,127,0.15); }
  .am-event:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .am-event-date { text-align:center; padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(129,189,74,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.25); }
  .am-event-date .m { display:block; font-size:0.72rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; color: var(--c, #81BD4A); font-weight:700; }
  .am-event-date .d { display:block; font-size:1.75rem; font-weight:800; line-height:1; margin: 0.15rem 0; }
  .am-event-date .y { display:block; font-size:0.78rem; color: #6b7280; }
  html[data-bs-theme="dark"] .am-event-date .y { color: #9ca3af; }
  .am-event-body h3 { font-size: 1.2rem; margin: 0 0 0.25rem 0; }
  .am-event-meta { display:flex; gap:1rem; font-size:0.82rem; color:#6b7280; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:0.5rem; }
  html[data-bs-theme="dark"] .am-event-meta { color:#9ca3af; }
  .am-event-meta i { margin-right: 0.3rem; }
  .am-event-body p { margin: 0; font-size: 0.95rem; }
  .am-event-tag { display:inline-block; font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; padding: 0.22rem 0.6rem; border-radius:999px; background: rgba(129,189,74,0.15); color: var(--c, #81BD4A); margin-top:0.4rem; }
  .am-event-cta { align-self:center; }
  .am-event-cta a { font-size:0.85rem; padding: 0.45rem 0.9rem; }
  .am-how { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px,1fr)); gap: 1rem; margin-top: 2rem; }
  .am-invite { display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4rem; align-items:start; }
  @media (max-width: 991px) { .am-invite { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 3rem; } }
  .am-invite-text h2 { text-align:left; font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 3.5vw, 2.75rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .am-invite-text ul li { margin-bottom: 0.4rem; line-height: 1.55; }
  .am-invite-card { background: #fff; padding: 2.25rem; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(127,127,127,0.1); }
  html[data-bs-theme="dark"] .am-invite-card { background: #1c1c1e; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); box-shadow: 0 4px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); }
  .am-invite-card h3 { margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; font-size: 1.25rem; }
  .am-how-card { padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(127,127,127,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(127,127,127,0.15); text-align:center; }
  .am-how-card i.hdr { font-size: 1.6rem; color: var(--c); display:block; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .am-how-card h4 { font-size: 0.95rem; margin: 0 0 0.4rem 0; }
  .am-how-card p { margin: 0; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #6b7280; line-height: 1.45; }
  html[data-bs-theme="dark"] .am-how-card p { color: #9ca3af; }
  .am-url { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem; max-width: 720px; margin: 1.5rem auto 2rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(129,189,74,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.3); }
  .am-url code { flex:1; min-width:0; font-size: 0.88rem; font-family: 'Source Code Pro', monospace; color: var(--c); overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; background:transparent; padding:0; }
  .am-url button { flex-shrink:0; padding: 0.45rem 0.9rem; font-size: 0.82rem; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--c); color: #fff; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 500; transition: background .15s; }
  .am-url button:hover { background: #6aa53a; }
  .am-url button.copied { background: #4b8b2a; }
  @media (max-width: 640px) { .am-event { grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr; } .am-event-cta { grid-column: 1 / -1; justify-self:start; } }
</style>

<div class="m" style="--c:#81BD4A;">

<div class="ev-hero am-ev-hero">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/alinmechenici/chenist_cybersecurity_cover.jpg');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">Alin Mechenici · Events</div>
    <h1>Vorträge, Workshops & Trainings</h1>
    <p>Verfolgen Sie, wo ich als Nächstes spreche, ausbilde oder mentoriere — oder laden Sie mich zu Ihrer Veranstaltung ein.</p>
    <div class="am-sub">
      <a class="primary" href="webcal://chen.ist/alinmechenici.ics"><i class="bi bi-calendar-plus"></i> Abonnieren (iCal)</a>
      <a href="/alinmechenici.ics" download><i class="bi bi-download"></i> .ics herunterladen</a>
      <a href="https://calendar.google.com/calendar/u/0/r?cid=https://chen.ist/alinmechenici.ics" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-google"></i> In Google hinzufügen</a>
      <a href="#invite"><i class="bi bi-send"></i> Mich einladen</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Einmal abonnieren, immer synchron</h2>
    <p class="sub">Ihr Kalender aktualisiert sich automatisch, wenn Termine hinzugefügt, geändert oder abgesagt werden.</p>
    <div class="am-url">
      <code>https://chen.ist/alinmechenici.ics</code>
      <button type="button" onclick="navigator.clipboard.writeText('https://chen.ist/alinmechenici.ics').then(()=>{this.textContent='Kopiert';this.classList.add('copied');setTimeout(()=>{this.textContent='Kopieren';this.classList.remove('copied');},1600);})">Kopieren</button>
    </div>
    <div class="am-how">
      <div class="am-how-card"><i class="bi bi-apple hdr"></i><h4>Apple Kalender</h4><p>Datei → Neues Abonnement, URL einfügen.</p></div>
      <div class="am-how-card"><i class="bi bi-google hdr"></i><h4>Google Kalender</h4><p>Einstellungen → Hinzufügen → Per URL.</p></div>
      <div class="am-how-card"><i class="bi bi-microsoft hdr"></i><h4>Outlook</h4><p>Kalender → Aus dem Web abonnieren.</p></div>
      <div class="am-how-card"><i class="bi bi-download hdr"></i><h4>Einmalig</h4><p><a href="/alinmechenici.ics" download class="m-lk">.ics herunterladen</a> und manuell importieren.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:6rem 0;" id="upcoming">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Regelmäßige & jährliche Programme</h2>
    <p class="sub">Eine bestätigte wöchentliche Session plus jährliche Programme mit vorläufigen Terminen. Abonnieren Sie, um feste Termine zu erhalten, sobald sie bestätigt sind.</p>
    <div style="max-width: 900px; margin: 3rem auto 0;">
      <div class="am-event">
        <div class="am-event-date"><span class="m">Jeden</span><span class="d"><i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i></span><span class="y">Montag</span></div>
        <div class="am-event-body"><h3>ON/OFF — Wöchentliches Training</h3><div class="am-event-meta"><span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Online</span><span><i class="bi bi-clock"></i> 18:00 — 19:30 EET</span><span><i class="bi bi-people"></i> CHENIST Academy</span></div><p>Wöchentliche KI-freie Session über Business, Cybersecurity, Open Source und Motorradkultur.</p><span class="am-event-tag">Wiederkehrend</span></div>
        <div class="am-event-cta"><a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="m-lk"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Substack</a></div>
      </div>
      <div class="am-event">
        <div class="am-event-date"><span class="m">Aug</span><span class="d">01</span><span class="y">2026</span></div>
        <div class="am-event-body"><h3>CHENIST Sommerschule — Cybersecurity & Cloud</h3><div class="am-event-meta"><span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova, RO</span><span><i class="bi bi-clock"></i> 1.–15. Aug</span><span><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Trainer</span></div><p>Zweiwöchiges Intensivprogramm zu Cybersecurity, Cloud und KI. Alin leitet die Module OS-Härtung, Datenschutz und Open-Source-Infrastruktur.</p><span class="am-event-tag" style="background:rgba(245,166,35,0.15);color:#c07200;">Vorläufig · via Feed bestätigen</span></div>
        <div class="am-event-cta"><a href="/academy/events/pages/summer-school-2025.html" class="m-lk"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i> Details</a></div>
      </div>
      <div class="am-event">
        <div class="am-event-date"><span class="m">Okt</span><span class="d">03</span><span class="y">2026</span></div>
        <div class="am-event-body"><h3>NASA Space Apps Challenge — Craiova</h3><div class="am-event-meta"><span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova, RO</span><span><i class="bi bi-clock"></i> 3.–4. Okt · 48h</span><span><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> Hauptorganisator</span></div><p>9. Ausgabe des globalen 48-Stunden-Hackathons der NASA. Open-Source-Lösungen für das Leben auf der Erde und im Weltraum.</p><span class="am-event-tag" style="background:rgba(245,166,35,0.15);color:#c07200;">Vorläufig · via Feed bestätigen</span></div>
        <div class="am-event-cta"><a href="/academy/events/pages/space-hackathon.html" class="m-lk"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i> Details</a></div>
      </div>
      <div class="am-event">
        <div class="am-event-date"><span class="m">Nov</span><span class="d">06</span><span class="y">2026</span></div>
        <div class="am-event-body"><h3>Cybersecurity Hackathon — Craiova</h3><div class="am-event-meta"><span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova, RO</span><span><i class="bi bi-clock"></i> 6.–8. Nov · 48h</span><span><i class="bi bi-mic"></i> Keynote + Mentor</span></div><p>48-Stunden-Cybersecurity-Challenge — CTF, Incident Response und defensive Operations. Alin eröffnet mit der Keynote und mentoriert Teams.</p><span class="am-event-tag" style="background:rgba(245,166,35,0.15);color:#c07200;">Vorläufig · via Feed bestätigen</span></div>
        <div class="am-event-cta"><a href="/academy/events/pages/cybersecurity-hackathon.html" class="m-lk"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i> Details</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" id="invite" style="padding:6rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="am-invite">
      <div class="am-invite-text">
        <h2>Laden Sie mich<br>zu Ihrer Veranstaltung ein.</h2>
        <p>Keynotes, Panels, Trainings, Workshops, Konferenzvorträge, Podcast-Auftritte. Themen, die mir am Herzen liegen:</p>
        <ul style="padding-left:1.2rem;">
          <li>Europäische digitale Souveränität &amp; Open-Source-Infrastruktur</li>
          <li>Cybersecurity für KMU — NIS2, Cyber-Hygiene, Aufbau von Blue-Team-Kapazitäten</li>
          <li>OS-Härtung, Privatsphäre &amp; Anonymität, Air-Gap-Netzwerke</li>
          <li>Bootstrapping von Communities, Train-the-Trainers-Methodik</li>
          <li>Gründergeschichten — von Rumänien nach Schweden, drei Unternehmen, zwei NGOs</li>
        </ul>
        <p style="margin-top:1.25rem;">Ich nehme Einladungen EU-weit an, bevorzuge Vor-Ort-Termine und nehme auch remote/virtuelle Sessions auf. Honorare und Reisekosten werden individuell besprochen — NGOs, Universitäten und Studentenveranstaltungen erhalten Vorzugskonditionen.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="am-invite-card m-form">
        <h3>Einladung senden</h3>
        <form action="https://formspree.io/f/mpwkaqev" method="POST">
          <div class="fr">
            <div class="fg"><label>Ihr Name *</label><input type="text" name="name" required placeholder="Vollständiger Name"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label>E-Mail *</label><input type="email" name="email" required placeholder="sie@organisation.eu"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="fr">
            <div class="fg"><label>Organisation</label><input type="text" name="organisation" placeholder="Firma / Universität / NGO"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label>Rolle</label><input type="text" name="role" placeholder="Organisator, Producer, …"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="fg"><label>Name der Veranstaltung *</label><input type="text" name="event_name" required placeholder="Konferenz, Workshop, Podcast…"></div>
          <div class="fr">
            <div class="fg"><label>Datum / Zeitfenster *</label><input type="text" name="event_date" required placeholder="z. B. 12. Okt. 2026, oder 'eine beliebige Woche in Q2'"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label>Ort *</label><input type="text" name="event_location" required placeholder="Stadt, Land (oder 'Remote')"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <label>Format *</label>
            <select name="event_format" required>
              <option value="">Auswählen…</option>
              <option value="keynote">Keynote / Vortrag</option>
              <option value="panel">Paneldiskussion</option>
              <option value="workshop">Workshop / Training</option>
              <option value="podcast">Podcast / Interview</option>
              <option value="mentor">Mentor / Jurymitglied</option>
              <option value="other">Sonstiges</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="fg"><label>Publikum & Thema *</label><textarea name="message" rows="4" required placeholder="Wer ist das Publikum? Welches Thema? Erwartete Größe? Sonstiges?"></textarea></div>
          <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="Speaking-Einladung — Alin Mechenici (chen.ist)">
          <input type="hidden" name="_source" value="alinmechenici-events-de">
          <input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none">
          <div class="fc"><input type="checkbox" required id="inv-priv"><label for="inv-priv" style="font-size:0.85rem;">Ich stimme der <a href="/de/privacy.html" target="_blank">Datenschutzerklärung</a> zu *</label></div>
          <button type="submit" class="m-b" style="width:100%; margin-top:1rem; color:#fff !important;"><i class="bi bi-send"></i> Einladung senden</button>
          <p style="font-size:0.78rem; color:#6b7280; margin-top:0.75rem; margin-bottom:0;">Ich antworte persönlich innerhalb von 3 Werktagen. Für dringende Anfragen: <a href="mailto:alin@chen.ist">alin@chen.ist</a>.</p>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="text-align:center;">
    <p class="sub" style="margin-bottom:2rem;">Bisher als Speaker, Organisator oder Trainer bei</p>
    <p style="font-size:1rem; color:#6b7280; max-width: 820px; margin: 0 auto;">NASA Space Apps Challenge (5 Ausgaben, Linköping &amp; Craiova) · TEDx Craiova · BNE Craiova · JCI Rumänien &amp; JCI Craiova · Mjärdevi Science Park (Linköping) · Heineken Romania (Tech-Lead) · AIESEC Rumänien · Dale Carnegie Train-the-Trainers · CHENIST Academy (wöchentlich) · rumänische nationale TV-, Radio- und Printmedien als Fachexperte.</p>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
